text.title: Dev Methodologies — Architecture Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the dev-methodologies-architecture methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: audit-existing
step.action: Score each pattern (PASS/WARN/FAIL) with evidence path.

step.name: prioritise-by-impact
step.action: Order by latency or correctness blast radius. n-plus-one and FK indexes first.

step.name: apply-one-pattern-per-pr
step.action: Implement one pattern; add a test; ship.

step.name: verify-perf
step.action: Compare query count + p95 before/after each pattern.

step.name: lock-in-baseline
step.action: Commit the audit report under .aidocs/audits/ as the architectural baseline.
